text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, when making our way back to the
academy, Kitasan Black says she wants to stop by
a shrine, so we head over to one.
choice_data_list:
So why did you want to visit a shrine all of a
sudden?

So why did you want to visit a shrine all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, I haven't been feeling in top form lately,
you see, so I asked my neighbors for advice,
and...

text_block_list.name: Neighbor A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, you've been feeling off lately, have you?
Well, that's no good.

text_block_list.name: Neighbor B
text_block_list.text:
Have you tried doing a cleansing prayer? I
sometimes go and do one when I'm feeling worse
for wear. You should give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Neighbor A
text_block_list.text:
They say that illness is born of the heart. You
might be surprised at how effective a prayer can
be. Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're right! That just might work!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, that's the long and short of it. Hang on,
I'll be right back!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, all done!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry to keep you waiting, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I hope my prayers will be heard and granted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At that very moment...

text_block_list.name: Neighbor A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Kita! What a coincidence running into you
here! Are you here to pray?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yes, I am! I just finished, actually!

text_block_list.name: Neighbor B
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! You beat us to it! We came to pray for
you to get back to your usual energetic self!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
What?! You came all the way out here, just for
me?!

text_block_list.name: Neighbor A
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We hate to see you feeling down! Now
then, if you'll excuse us, we have a prayer or two
to make.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the two of them head over to the
shrine and clasp their hands together in prayer.

text_block_list.name: Neighbors A and B
text_block_list.text: May Kita's health quickly return to normal!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you both!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy! It's like I'm bursting with energy too!
Wow, I feel great!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The kindness of her neighbors helps Kitasan Black
perk back up and feel much better again.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I just realized I'm always praying for stuff, but I
never do anything in return! Shrines are such a big
part of festivals too... I should be doing more!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I have to go convey my thanks properly and make
sure I make my appreciation clear! Sorry, please
hold on just a little more!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for everything you do. I'm so
grateful for how festivals put a smile on people's faces...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
So thanks for that and, um, I'd like to thank you for the
mikoshi parade from last summer, and also—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black's fervent prayers and expression of
thanks take longer than expected...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry for the wait! I managed to say all my thanks!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Phew... Wow, am I exhausted, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems her heartfelt prayer actually ended up
fatiguing her even more. Kitasan Black's condition
doesn't improve at all.
